dialog.title: Award Experience
dialog.enemiesHint: Drag actors from the sidebar or compendiums to add enemies.
dialog.noRecipients: No party members selected to receive XP.

chat.title: Experience Awarded
chat.revertConfirmContent: Subtract the awarded XP from each recipient? This cannot be undone from the chat card.

showOnCombatEnd.name: Show XP Dialog on Combat End
showOnCombatEnd.hint: When combat ends, open the XP award dialog for the GM.

individualXp.name: Individual XP Distribution
individualXp.hint: Show per-member XP inputs instead of a single shared amount.

partyFolderName.name: Party Folder Name
partyFolderName.hint: Actor folder name for party members (used when dnd4e-party-sheet is not active).
